case_title: CANYON PACIFIC MANAGEMENT COMPANY,INC., VS. TIMOTHY ROCHE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANYON PACIFIC MANAGEMENT COMPANY,INC.
